title: Kazakhstan Declaration of Assets and Liabilities of a Natural Person — Schedule 250.04 (Foreign Securities, Digital Assets, and Foreign Brokerage Accounts)
description: The Ministry of Finance of the Republic of Kazakhstan's "форма 250.04 — Сведения о наличии ценных бумаг, производных финансовых инструментов, в том числе за пределами Республики Казахстан ... о наличии цифровых активов ... и о деньгах на иностранных брокерских счетах" (Form 250.04, foreign securities/derivative financial instruments, digital assets, and foreign brokerage accounts), Appendix 4 to the Declaration of Assets and Liabilities of a Natural Person (Form 250.00, `kz/kgd/declaration-of-assets-and-liabilities`, GOV-4043). Filed with the State Revenue Committee (Комитет государственных доходов, KGD) as an attachment to Form 250.00 whenever the declarant marks gating item 07 (securities/derivatives whose issuers are registered outside Kazakhstan), item 08 (digital assets, including outside Kazakhstan), and/or item 09 (money on foreign brokerage accounts) on the main declaration. Approved as Appendix 4 to the Declaration (itself part of Appendix 10 to Order of the Minister of Finance of the Republic of Kazakhstan No. 695 of 12 November 2025), published in full, unauthenticated, on the Ministry of Justice's own legal-information system, ИПС «Әділет». This v1.0.0 models Form 250.04 in full — its own taxpayer-identification header (items 1-2, shared with the other five 250.0X schedules) and all three of its own repeating sections: Раздел В securities/derivatives (four rows — name, quantity, country code, currency code, and acquisition price), Раздел В digital assets (three rows — name, quantity, total price in tenge, exchange/platform name, and crypto-wallet details), and Раздел В foreign brokerage accounts (two rows — account number, institution/broker name, country code, currency code, and year-end balance) — leaving the last remaining companion schedule (Form 250.06) disclosed as a separate, open backlog candidate, per the parent Form 250.00 document's own description. GovSchema is an independent, non-profit standards body and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the Government of the Republic of Kazakhstan or the State Revenue Committee.

authority.name: Комитет государственных доходов Министерства финансов Республики Казахстан (State Revenue Committee of the Ministry of Finance of the Republic of Kazakhstan)

source.documentRef: Приложение 4 к Декларации об активах и обязательствах физического лица (форма 250.00), Приложение 10 к приказу Министра финансов Республики Казахстан от 12 ноября 2025 года № 695 — форма 250.04

verification.notes: GovSchema Standard Research cycle GOV-4078, deepening Kazakhstan's Taxes vertical by authoring the fifth of the six disclosed companion schedules to Form 250.00 (250.01, 250.05, 250.02, and 250.03 already authored via GOV-4050/GOV-4057/GOV-4064/GOV-4071). Per the GOV-4050 cycle's own field-count sizing, 250.04 is one of the two largest schedules (~17-18 columns, three repeating sections), tied with the already-authored 250.02, and is the natural remaining pick alongside 250.06. Independently fetched this cycle: the schedule page image /files/1576/49/200.jpg (curl -k, HTTP 200, 169,344 bytes), read directly via a 3x Lanczos upscale (image was legible at full resolution without further zoomed crops). Boundary-checked via its own barcode (2625004010008, encoding form 250.04), consistent with the sequential image numbering already confirmed across the other five schedules (195-196.jpg = Form 250.00; 197.jpg = 250.01; 198.jpg = 250.02; 199.jpg = 250.03; 201.jpg = 250.05), leaving 200.jpg as 250.04's own slot. Also re-fetched the order's own full HTML document (curl -k, HTTP 200, 1,716,534 bytes after decompression) and read Глава 6 ("Составление формы 250.04", paragraphs 20-23) in full, cross-checking every column against its own prose description. Confirmed three repeating sections directly by visual count, each with a genuinely different row capacity on the same page: item 07 (securities/derivatives) prints four blank entry rows, item 08 (digital assets) prints three, and item 09 (foreign brokerage accounts) prints two — a sharper row-count gradient across three sections on one page than any prior 250.0X schedule (which had varied by at most one row between two sections). A genuine, disclosed structural difference between the digital-assets section and the other two: item 08 has no country-code or currency-code column at all, unlike item 07 and item 09 (both of which carry the same two footnoted classifiers already established across every 250.0X schedule — Классификатор стран мира, two-letter; Классификатор валют, three-letter, Decision No. 378 of the Customs Union Commission, 20 September 2010); Глава 6 paragraph 22 confirms the digital-asset total-price column is always denominated in tenge, explaining the absence of a currency-code column for that section specifically. The digital-asset quantity column's own worked example (0.00000001, for Bitcoin) discloses that this column carries fractional quantities to at least eight decimal places, modelled as an unconstrained non-negative number rather than an integer. Глава 6 paragraph 21 also discloses a genuine scope/combination note not visible on the image itself: securities of the same type bought at different prices must be recorded on separate rows, while the same securities bought at different times but the same price may be combined onto a single row. No submission was made and no live kgd.gov.kz/cabinet.salyk.kz account was created or required to author this schema.

fields.name: iin
fields.label: ИИН
fields.description: The declarant's 12-digit Individual Identification Number (ИИН), the same identifier used on the main Form 250.00 declaration this schedule is attached to.

fields.name: representedPersonIin
fields.label: ИИН представляемого лица
fields.description: The 12-digit IIN of the minor and/or legally incapacitated person being represented, if this schedule is filed by a legal representative. The schedule page prints only a single IIN box here, unlike the main Form 250.00 declaration's own separate boolean gate and name fields for the same case.

fields.name: currentSheetNumber
fields.label: Укажите номер текущего листа
fields.description: The sequential sheet number of this schedule page, printed in a box at the top right of every page of this schedule (relevant when more than one page is filed to list additional rows).

fields.name: securitiesEntry1Name
fields.label: Наименование ценных бумаг, принадлежащих лицу, представляющему декларацию (строка 1)
fields.description: The name of the security or derivative financial instrument (ПФИ) whose issuer is registered outside Kazakhstan, reported in row 1 of item 07 (Раздел В). Worked example: Акции Apple (Apple shares). Глава 6 paragraph 21 adds a scope note not visible on the image itself: if the same type of asset was bought at different prices, each purchase is recorded on a separate row; if the same asset was bought at different times but at the same price, the holdings may be combined onto one row.

fields.name: securitiesEntry1Quantity
fields.label: Количество ценных бумаг, ПФИ (строка 1)
fields.description: The quantity of the security or derivative held, printed as млн./тыс. place-value digit-box groups and modelled here as a single numeric quantity, per this registry's established convention for such digit-box groups. Worked example: 100.

fields.name: securitiesEntry1CountryCode
fields.label: Код страны (строка 1)
fields.description: The two-letter country code of the country in which the security or derivative was issued, per the Classifier of World Countries (Decision No. 378 of the Customs Union Commission, 20 September 2010) — the same two-letter classifier already established across every 250.0X schedule. Worked example: CA.

fields.name: securitiesEntry1CurrencyCode
fields.label: Код валюты (строка 1)
fields.description: The three-letter currency code in which the security or derivative was acquired, per the Classifier of Currencies (the same Decision No. 378 of the Customs Union Commission). Worked example: USD.

fields.name: securitiesEntry1AcquisitionPrice
fields.label: Цена одной ценной бумаги, ПФИ на момент приобретения (строка 1)
fields.description: The price of one unit of the security or derivative at the time of acquisition, printed as млрд/млн/тыс place-value digit-box groups and modelled here as a single numeric amount, per this registry's established convention for such digit-box groups. Worked example: 100000.

fields.name: securitiesEntry2Name
fields.label: Наименование ценных бумаг, принадлежащих лицу, представляющему декларацию (строка 2)
fields.description: The name of the security or derivative financial instrument reported in this row of item 07. See securitiesEntry1Name for the full description, including the disclosed combine/split scope note.

fields.name: securitiesEntry2Quantity
fields.label: Количество ценных бумаг, ПФИ (строка 2)
fields.description: The quantity of the security or derivative held, reported in this row of item 07. See securitiesEntry1Quantity for the full description.

fields.name: securitiesEntry2CountryCode
fields.label: Код страны (строка 2)
fields.description: The two-letter country code of the country in which the security or derivative in this row was issued. See securitiesEntry1CountryCode for the classifier reference.

fields.name: securitiesEntry2CurrencyCode
fields.label: Код валюты (строка 2)
fields.description: The three-letter currency code in which the security or derivative in this row was acquired. See securitiesEntry1CurrencyCode for the classifier reference.

fields.name: securitiesEntry2AcquisitionPrice
fields.label: Цена одной ценной бумаги, ПФИ на момент приобретения (строка 2)
fields.description: The price of one unit of the security or derivative at the time of acquisition, reported in this row of item 07. See securitiesEntry1AcquisitionPrice for the full description.

fields.name: securitiesEntry3Name
fields.label: Наименование ценных бумаг, принадлежащих лицу, представляющему декларацию (строка 3)
fields.description: The name of the security or derivative financial instrument reported in this row of item 07. See securitiesEntry1Name for the full description, including the disclosed combine/split scope note.

fields.name: securitiesEntry3Quantity
fields.label: Количество ценных бумаг, ПФИ (строка 3)
fields.description: The quantity of the security or derivative held, reported in this row of item 07. See securitiesEntry1Quantity for the full description.

fields.name: securitiesEntry3CountryCode
fields.label: Код страны (строка 3)
fields.description: The two-letter country code of the country in which the security or derivative in this row was issued. See securitiesEntry1CountryCode for the classifier reference.

fields.name: securitiesEntry3CurrencyCode
fields.label: Код валюты (строка 3)
fields.description: The three-letter currency code in which the security or derivative in this row was acquired. See securitiesEntry1CurrencyCode for the classifier reference.

fields.name: securitiesEntry3AcquisitionPrice
fields.label: Цена одной ценной бумаги, ПФИ на момент приобретения (строка 3)
fields.description: The price of one unit of the security or derivative at the time of acquisition, reported in this row of item 07. See securitiesEntry1AcquisitionPrice for the full description.

fields.name: securitiesEntry4Name
fields.label: Наименование ценных бумаг, принадлежащих лицу, представляющему декларацию (строка 4)
fields.description: The name of the security or derivative financial instrument reported in this row of item 07. See securitiesEntry1Name for the full description, including the disclosed combine/split scope note.

fields.name: securitiesEntry4Quantity
fields.label: Количество ценных бумаг, ПФИ (строка 4)
fields.description: The quantity of the security or derivative held, reported in this row of item 07. See securitiesEntry1Quantity for the full description.

fields.name: securitiesEntry4CountryCode
fields.label: Код страны (строка 4)
fields.description: The two-letter country code of the country in which the security or derivative in this row was issued. See securitiesEntry1CountryCode for the classifier reference.

fields.name: securitiesEntry4CurrencyCode
fields.label: Код валюты (строка 4)
fields.description: The three-letter currency code in which the security or derivative in this row was acquired. See securitiesEntry1CurrencyCode for the classifier reference.

fields.name: securitiesEntry4AcquisitionPrice
fields.label: Цена одной ценной бумаги, ПФИ на момент приобретения (строка 4)
fields.description: The price of one unit of the security or derivative at the time of acquisition, reported in this row of item 07. See securitiesEntry1AcquisitionPrice for the full description.

fields.name: digitalAssetEntry1Name
fields.label: Наименование цифровых активов (строка 1)
fields.description: The name of the digital asset held, including outside Kazakhstan, reported in row 1 of item 08 (Раздел В). Worked example: Bitcoin.

fields.name: digitalAssetEntry1Quantity
fields.label: Количество цифровых активов (строка 1)
fields.description: The quantity of the digital asset held. Unlike the securities section's own quantity column, this is printed as a plain text field rather than a digit-box group, and the worked example (0.00000001, for Bitcoin) shows this column carries fractional quantities to at least eight decimal places — modelled as an unconstrained non-negative number rather than an integer.

fields.name: digitalAssetEntry1TotalPriceTenge
fields.label: Итоговая цена цифровых активов, в тенге (строка 1)
fields.description: The total price of the digital asset holding, printed as a plain text field and, per Глава 6 paragraph 22's own prose, always denominated in tenge (KZT) — unlike the securities and brokerage-account sections on the same page, this section has no country-code or currency-code column at all. Worked example: 48 640 000.

fields.name: digitalAssetEntry1ExchangeName
fields.label: Наименование биржи цифровых активов или иных платформ (строка 1)
fields.description: The name of the digital-asset exchange or other platform on which the asset is held, reported in row 1 of item 08. Worked example: Ataix.

fields.name: digitalAssetEntry1WalletDetails
fields.label: Реквизиты криптокошелька (строка 1)
fields.description: The details (address/identifier) of the crypto-wallet holding the digital asset, reported in row 1 of item 08. Worked example: ABCDEFG1234567890.

fields.name: digitalAssetEntry2Name
fields.label: Наименование цифровых активов (строка 2)
fields.description: The name of the digital asset held, reported in this row of item 08. See digitalAssetEntry1Name for the full description.

fields.name: digitalAssetEntry2Quantity
fields.label: Количество цифровых активов (строка 2)
fields.description: The quantity of the digital asset held, reported in this row of item 08. See digitalAssetEntry1Quantity for the full description, including the disclosed fractional-precision finding.

fields.name: digitalAssetEntry2TotalPriceTenge
fields.label: Итоговая цена цифровых активов, в тенге (строка 2)
fields.description: The total price of the digital asset holding in this row, always in tenge. See digitalAssetEntry1TotalPriceTenge for the full description, including the disclosed no-currency-column structural note.

fields.name: digitalAssetEntry2ExchangeName
fields.label: Наименование биржи цифровых активов или иных платформ (строка 2)
fields.description: The name of the digital-asset exchange or other platform on which the asset in this row is held. See digitalAssetEntry1ExchangeName for the full description.

fields.name: digitalAssetEntry2WalletDetails
fields.label: Реквизиты криптокошелька (строка 2)
fields.description: The details of the crypto-wallet holding the digital asset in this row. See digitalAssetEntry1WalletDetails for the full description.

fields.name: digitalAssetEntry3Name
fields.label: Наименование цифровых активов (строка 3)
fields.description: The name of the digital asset held, reported in this row of item 08. See digitalAssetEntry1Name for the full description.

fields.name: digitalAssetEntry3Quantity
fields.label: Количество цифровых активов (строка 3)
fields.description: The quantity of the digital asset held, reported in this row of item 08. See digitalAssetEntry1Quantity for the full description, including the disclosed fractional-precision finding.

fields.name: digitalAssetEntry3TotalPriceTenge
fields.label: Итоговая цена цифровых активов, в тенге (строка 3)
fields.description: The total price of the digital asset holding in this row, always in tenge. See digitalAssetEntry1TotalPriceTenge for the full description, including the disclosed no-currency-column structural note.

fields.name: digitalAssetEntry3ExchangeName
fields.label: Наименование биржи цифровых активов или иных платформ (строка 3)
fields.description: The name of the digital-asset exchange or other platform on which the asset in this row is held. See digitalAssetEntry1ExchangeName for the full description.

fields.name: digitalAssetEntry3WalletDetails
fields.label: Реквизиты криптокошелька (строка 3)
fields.description: The details of the crypto-wallet holding the digital asset in this row. See digitalAssetEntry1WalletDetails for the full description.

fields.name: brokerageAccountEntry1AccountNumber
fields.label: Номер брокерского счета (строка 1)
fields.description: The account number of the foreign brokerage account, reported in row 1 of item 09 (Раздел В). Worked example: 111122223333.

fields.name: brokerageAccountEntry1InstitutionName
fields.label: Наименование финансового учреждения, имя брокера (строка 1)
fields.description: The name of the financial institution (broker) holding the account, reported in row 1 of item 09. Worked example: FREEDOM FINANCE GLOBAL.

fields.name: brokerageAccountEntry1CountryCode
fields.label: Код страны (строка 1)
fields.description: The two-letter country code of the country where the financial institution (broker) is located, per the Classifier of World Countries. See securitiesEntry1CountryCode for the classifier reference. Worked example: CA.

fields.name: brokerageAccountEntry1CurrencyCode
fields.label: Код валюты (строка 1)
fields.description: The three-letter currency code in which the money on the brokerage account is held. See securitiesEntry1CurrencyCode for the classifier reference. Worked example: USD.

fields.name: brokerageAccountEntry1BalanceAmount
fields.label: Сумма остатка на счете на конец отчетного года (строка 1)
fields.description: The account balance at the end of the reporting year (31 December of the year preceding the year the assets-and-liabilities declaration is filed for), printed as млрд/млн/тыс place-value digit-box groups and modelled here as a single numeric amount, per this registry's established convention for such digit-box groups. Worked example: 350000.

fields.name: brokerageAccountEntry2AccountNumber
fields.label: Номер брокерского счета (строка 2)
fields.description: The account number of the foreign brokerage account in this row. See brokerageAccountEntry1AccountNumber for the full description.

fields.name: brokerageAccountEntry2InstitutionName
fields.label: Наименование финансового учреждения, имя брокера (строка 2)
fields.description: The name of the financial institution (broker) holding the account in this row. See brokerageAccountEntry1InstitutionName for the full description.

fields.name: brokerageAccountEntry2CountryCode
fields.label: Код страны (строка 2)
fields.description: The two-letter country code of the country where the financial institution (broker) in this row is located. See brokerageAccountEntry1CountryCode for the classifier reference.

fields.name: brokerageAccountEntry2CurrencyCode
fields.label: Код валюты (строка 2)
fields.description: The three-letter currency code in which the money on the brokerage account in this row is held. See brokerageAccountEntry1CurrencyCode for the classifier reference.

fields.name: brokerageAccountEntry2BalanceAmount
fields.label: Сумма остатка на счете на конец отчетного года (строка 2)
fields.description: The account balance at the end of the reporting year for the account in this row. See brokerageAccountEntry1BalanceAmount for the full description.
